decision_summary.rationale: EBS volume is confirmed as a ghost resource with no attached instance for 7 days. Destruction is the optimal action to eliminate ongoing storage costs.

llm_response.technical_explanation: The EBS volume has been in 'available' state for 7 days with no attachment history, confirming it as a ghost resource. The gp3 volume type incurs $8.00/month in storage costs without providing any value. Destruction will permanently remove the resource and associated costs.

risks: Data loss: Volume contents will be permanently deleted
Potential dependency risk if volume was used for temporary storage
risk_assessment.verification_steps:
1. Confirm volume is not referenced in any EC2 launch templates
2. Verify no backup systems depend on this volume
3. Check application logs for recent usage references

failed_checks.check_name: Ensure all data stored in the EBS is securely encrypted

raw.url: Add an api key '--bc-api-key <api-key>' to see more detailed insights via https://bridgecrew.cloud
